texts.orig: Take a ride to the Heart of T savo Ground Package
texts.text: Take a ride to the Heart of T savo Ground Package

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Package Includes:
texts.text: Package Includes:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Accommodation: Stay on a Full Board basis.
texts.text: Accommodation: Stay on a Full Board basis.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Transfers: Return transfers from Voi Train Station to the lodge/resort.
texts.text: Transfers: Return transfers from Voi Train Station to the lodge/resort.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Game Drives: One game drive per night within the Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary. Additional game drives incur extra charges.
texts.text: Game Drives: One game drive per night within the Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary. Additional game drives incur extra charges.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Entry Fees: E.A Residents/Citizens Sanctuary Entry Fees included.
texts.text: Entry Fees: E.A Residents/Citizens Sanctuary Entry Fees included.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Heritage Tour: Complimentary World War I Heritage Tour at The Taita Hills Museum.
texts.text: Heritage Tour: Complimentary World War I Heritage Tour at The Taita Hills Museum.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Green Season Offer: Book for 2 nights and get 50% off from the 3rd night onwards! Valid for stays between 1st April 2025 and 30th June 2025 (Excluding Easter Holidays)
texts.text: Green Season Offer: Book for 2 nights and get 50% off from the 3rd night onwards! Valid for stays between 1st April 2025 and 30th June 2025 (Excluding Easter Holidays)

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Child Policy:
texts.text: Child Policy:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Under 5 Years: Not permitted at Salt Lick Safari Lodge for safety reasons.
texts.text: Under 5 Years: Not permitted at Salt Lick Safari Lodge for safety reasons.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Aged 5-11.99 Years:
texts.text: Aged 5-11.99 Years:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Sharing with 1 or 2 adults: Charged 50% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.
texts.text: Sharing with 1 or 2 adults: Charged 50% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: In their own room (min. 2, max. 3): Charged 75% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.
texts.text: In their own room (min. 2, max. 3): Charged 75% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Children under 12 years should ideally share rooms next to parents/adults (subject to availability).
texts.text: Children under 12 years should ideally share rooms next to parents/adults (subject to availability).

texts.text: Bookings are on a request basis and subject to room availability.

texts.orig: Standard check-in time is 12:00 PM and check-out time is 10:00 AM.
texts.text: Standard check-in time is 12:00 PM and check-out time is 10:00 AM.
